item.title: Coinbase Plays Uno Reverse on Hackers
item.author: Seytonic
item.content:encoded:
Get 20% off DeleteMe US consumer plans when you go to https://joindeleteme.com/seytonic and use promo code SEYTONIC at checkout. DeleteMe International Plans: https://international.joindeleteme.com/
0:00 Intro 0:16 Coinbase Plays Uno Reverse Card on Hackers 2:20 DeleteMe (ad) 3:25 Embarrassment for Lockbit 5:34 Why NOT To Pay a Ransom
Sources: https://x.com/brian_armstrong/status/1922967787309256807 https://www.coinbase.com/en-gb/blog/protecting-our-customers-standing-up-to-extortionists https://www.sec.gov/ix?doc=/Archives/edgar/data/1679788/000167978825000094/coin-20250514.htm#fact-identifier-22
